title: Ten Minutes for Luffy — Part 3
description: The fighters of Dressrosa protect Luffy until his Haki returns for the final blow.
scene: On pages 15–19, Luffy, Doflamingo, Dressrosa Citizens, Colosseum Fighters, Trafalgar Law move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The Pirates' fight isn't over yet!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But all the people in the whole country...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: are being chased by the birdcage to this central district!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hey... doesn't it look like he can't fight any more...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: If you get any closer, you'll get mixed up in the fight and die!! Stay away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: I am GATS, the Announcer from the Colosseum!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Even I am starting to like this guy!! Gyahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: You were the mysterious gladiator Lucy... weren't you?!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: I knew it!! There aren't many strong runts like you out there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Doflamingo's coming after you! What will you do in this round?!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Is there anything I can do to help?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: After using Boundman... I can't use Haki for ten minutes...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: I can still run, but there's no telling what he'll do in the meantime...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Once I get my Haki back...I'll finish this in one more attack for sure....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: and that... will be the end of his reign...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Hey!! If I buy you ten minutes...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: ...you'll free us from this birdcage, is that what you're say- ing...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: We need ten minutes!!! Are you ready, boys?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: It's all the fighters from the Tourna- went...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: The one's who didn't throw their lot in with you!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: We're sorry, Lucy!! We gave in to the temptation of the bounty he placed on you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: We never dreamed you'd actually be able to corner Doflamingo!

summary: This part focuses on ten minutes for luffy, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
